title: Whole Housewares - Set of 3 Bathroom Canisters - Storage Container Jars - Premium Glass Apothecary Jars with Lids - Small Glass Jars for Kitchen or Bathroom Storage - Decorative Crystal Containers
description:
About this item
Freshness in Every Jar: Our glass storage jars feature airtight lids that preserve the integrity of your items, ensuring they stay clean and fresh for longer, ideal for organizing
Healthy And Durable: Choose the healthier option with our wide-mouth glass jars. Unlike plastic, glass doesn't discolor, retain odors, or release harmful chemicals into your food
Versatile Storage Solution: This bathroom container set is perfect for organizing various items, from cotton swabs to bath salts; stylishly enhancing your kitchen, bathroom or living room
See-Through Convenience: Easily view the contents without removing the lid, thanks to the clear design and hinged airtight feature, handmade glass adds elegance to your space
Quality Craftsmanship: Our bathroom canisters with lids provide true airtight storage, preserving your items' quality and enhancing your home organization. Experience superior craftsmanship!
reviews_5s: Love the glass look. Perfect sizes would def buy againI like the heavy glass and the tight fit of the lidsThey are small, however we live in an apartment now.I am using them in a bathroom and I thought they were not going to fit my small spacing, but they look nice!Love the 3 sizes of jars and they seal shut. Very versatile . I feel like they are good quality for the price. Exactly what I was looking for!Love this look to update and store all my vitamins on my vanity instead of plastic bottles sitting out. My vanity is no longer an eyesore! Love that they also have an airtight seal! They are just the perfect size.I love the way these jars declutter my bathroom counter!!Smaller than I thought. I have got to be better about looking for the sizes on things.Great value. Easy to clean, great seal. Makes storing my candy easy. Lid is easy to remove.I was looking for some containers to hold my bath salt, q-tips, and flossers… these fit the bill. I’d love to find this exact set where they are a little larger, but this works beautifully.
reviews_1s:
Even though the advertising picture shows it, Q-tips DO NOT fit in the small container. Could not put lid on. Returned set.I love the glass and shape.
But they are entirely too small.
I need the same 4 times larger than the largest jar.Returned un opened, found something Iiked betterThis product maybe deserves five stars. But of the three lids I received, the largest one does not have the ring that would make it airtight.Small container isn't tall enough for swabs/q-tipsI was so excited for these to arrive and based on good reviews was sadly disappointed when these arrived. The small lid had a crack, the medium jar was deformed, the large dirty…ew gross. I also felt they look much better in the pictures. They look like plastic with very prominent side seams that run the length of the glass. They are going back.Cute jars but the bottoms are too thin, my largest jar broke just from picking it up and setting it down, I didn't even drop it. I can't even use the protein powder that was inside it because I'm concerned there would be glass in the product. Not worth the money.The jars have a seam the runs vertically, it looks odd. Also there is a suction top so maybe it’s ok for storing things to keep fresh, but it’s not useful for frequently taking top off to grab contents and replacing the top. Opening and closing requires two hands.It was shattered into tiny pieces when it arrivedThe picture is very miss leading. The jars are smaller than I expected. The small one couldn’t hold Qtips, even though the picture shows they can.
